en:
Game Laws:
1. There is a Draw Deck, a Discard Deck, and a Rules Deck
2. There is an Upper Game Zone and a Lower Game Zone
Game Start: Add 1 Input Zone Card to the Upper Zone

The beginning of a Stack.
Next: If in Upper Zone, drop card to open space in Lower Zone. Then Draw a Card.

The beginning of a Stack. Cannot be moved. Allows Cards to be placed on top of itself.
Next: If in Upper Zone, drop card to open space in Lower Zone. Then Draw a Card.
